name: qinling-real-dem-slice

presentation.visualIntent: Readable Guanzhong/Hanzhong/Sichuan basin lowlands with Qinling as a wall, not a sea-surrounded mountain island.

notes: Built from FABDEM tiles intersecting the Qinling region bounds.
Real elevations are normalized into a gameplay-friendly stylized height range that keeps lowland basins readable.
Required FABDEM tiles: 36. Available required tiles: 34.
Missing required tiles filled by neighbor interpolation: N32E103_FABDEM_V1-2.tif, N32E104_FABDEM_V1-2.tif.
